meta_title: For Freelancers: Claude Code skills setup to Solve stuck with basic apps (Advanced Comparison)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome stuck with basic apps. A Advanced-level Comparison using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Claude Code Skills Setup to Scale Fast
content.seo_description: Overcome basic app limitations with a professional Claude Code skills setup. Learn to integrate Antigravity for high-velocity, scalable freelance development.
content.answer_block: To break past basic app limitations, integrate Claude Code with Antigravity to automate architectural scaffolding and complex logic implementation. By defining custom skill sets, you transform your CLI into a force multiplier, enabling you to ship production-grade SaaS features in hours rather than days, directly boosting your freelance margins.
content.intro:
The freelance graveyard is littered with developers stuck in 'tutorial hell,' churning out basic CRUD apps that fail to impress high-ticket clients. You know the feeling: the project scope creeps, the architecture turns to spaghetti, and your velocity hits a wall when you need to implement complex, custom business logic.

It is time to stop typing boilerplate and start orchestrating intelligence. By mastering the Claude Code skills setup, you move from a manual coder to an AI-augmented architect. This guide bridges the gap between simple scripts and enterprise-ready systems using the precision of Claude Code and the structural rigor of Antigravity.

steps.title: Define Architectural Constraints
steps.description: Before writing code, use Antigravity to define the project constraints. This prevents the AI from hallucinating unconventional patterns.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the project requirements for a high-performance SaaS backend. Generate a strict architectural schema including folder structure, naming conventions, and dependency injection patterns for a scalable Node.js/TypeScript environment.
steps.claude_code_command: claude config --set-instructions 'Follow the architectural schema defined in the antigravity.json file strictly.'

steps.title: Initialize the Claude Skills Registry
steps.description: Create a local library of 'Skill' definitions that Claude can reference for repeatable tasks like auth-flow or database migration.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a library of 5 reusable development skills for authentication, logging, error handling, input validation, and API response formatting. Format these as YAML snippets for easy inclusion.

steps.title: Automate Boilerplate Generation
steps.description: Use Claude Code to scaffold the core application logic based on the Antigravity architectural blueprint.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Based on the previously defined schema, generate the base services and controller files. Ensure all imports are absolute paths and type safety is enforced.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'scaffold the core service layer using the auth-flow skill'

steps.title: Implement Complex Business Logic
steps.description: Inject high-value logic using Claude Code's context-aware file editing capabilities.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor the current user signup flow to include multi-factor authentication and event-driven logging using an asynchronous queue approach.
steps.claude_code_command: claude edit 'implement MFA logic in userService.ts using the event-driven pattern'

steps.title: Continuous Validation and Testing
steps.description: Automate the testing cycle by instructing Claude to write unit tests for every new function generated.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate Jest test suites for the newly created services. Ensure 90% coverage for edge cases and error handling paths.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate unit tests for all services and execute the test runner'

pro_tips: Always maintain a local .claudeignore file to prevent the AI from indexing massive node_modules or build artifacts.
Use Antigravity to generate 'System Personas' for different project types, switching between 'Security-Focused' and 'Speed-Focused' modes.
Chain Claude Code commands by piping output to a shell script to automate multi-file refactoring across your entire project.
Explicitly define your preferred documentation style in the global Claude instructions to ensure every function comes with standardized JSDoc.
When facing a complex bug, use Claude Code to perform a 'recursive trace'—ask it to analyze the execution path through three layers of abstraction.
resources: Claude Code CLI Best Practices: https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code
content.next_steps: After completing this setup, your next step is to create a 'Standard Operating Procedure' (SOP) file in your root directory. This allows you to onboard Claude to any new client project in seconds by simply pointing it to your SOP.
content.conversion_block: Stop fighting your editor and start building at the speed of thought. By leveraging these advanced skills, you free up hours of billable time and deliver work that separates you from the crowd. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
